Thanks for your interest in Olduvai! A heads-up before you invest time:

**External patches are not merged at this time** — a CLA is planned first
(see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the why, including the
content policy every change must clear).

**Bug reports are very welcome** as issues — ideally with the in-game F5
report attached (written to `~/olduvai/bug_reports`).
